payload.label: bed
payload.long_description: Neatly made bed with white and gray striped bedding on a dark wooden frame, headboard and footboard partially visible at left and right; pillow and bedside lamp visible indicating the bed is edge-cropped and partially shown — appears queen-sized and approximately 1.5 meters from the camera.
